packageRules.description: Maintain digest pins in reusable Node workflows

Do NOT digest-pin this repo's own co-located action in node-ci. A first-party self-reference pinned FROM the lagging v1 tag resolves to a commit predating the action and breaks (#135); it has no supply-chain reason to pin and stays on @main, which always resolves to a commit that has the action. Ordered after the pin rule so it overrides pinDigests for this dep.
